title: Connor McMonigle
text: Home * People * Connor McMonigle Connor McMonigle [1] Connor McMonigle , an American computer science major at the University of Washington and member of its Advanced Robotics team [2] . He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Seer using a custom NNUE implementation, first released in October 2020 [3] . His GitHub repository further provides a C++ template based neural network reference implementation [4] , and the cartesian-gp-chess-engine , an experiment involving evolving cartesian genetic programs to evaluate chess positions, using self play to evolve slightly superior chess playing cartesian programs each generation [5] .
